The Acadian Advantage delivers value in five areas: Time, Cost, Quality, Scope, and Safety.
The Acadian Advantage project manager provides continuous communication and reporting to the client throughout the project.
continuous communication and reporting to client
The Acadian Advantage is a building approach that combines industry-leading processes and a commitment to delivering projects on time, on budget, and of superior quality.

For Scope, the Acadian Advantage sets clear expectations, defines what's included and excluded, and reviews resource sharing.
